title: Kazakhstan Declaration of Assets and Liabilities of a Natural Person — Schedule 250.01 (Foreign Real Estate and Foreign-Registered Vehicles)
description: The Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan's "форма 250.01 — Сведения о наличии недвижимого имущества и транспортных средств, зарегистрированных в иностранном государстве" (Form 250.01, foreign-registered real estate and vehicles), Appendix 1 to the Declaration of Assets and Liabilities of a Natural Person (Form 250.00, `kz/kgd/declaration-of-assets-and-liabilities`, GOV-4043). Filed with the State Revenue Committee (Комитет государственных доходов, KGD) as an attachment to Form 250.00 whenever the declarant marks gating item 01 (foreign real estate) and/or item 02 (foreign-registered vehicles) on the main declaration. Approved as Appendix 1 to the Declaration (itself part of Appendix 10 to Order of the Minister of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan No. 695 of 12 November 2025), published in full, unauthenticated, on the Ministry of Justice's own legal-information system, ИПС «Әділет». This v1.0.0 models Form 250.01 in full — its own taxpayer-identification header (items 1-2, shared with the other five 250.0X schedules) and both of its own repeating sections: foreign real estate (row 01, up to the three rows the reference specimen prints — property type, country code, cadastral/identification number, and address) and foreign-registered vehicles (row 02, the same three rows — vehicle type, brand/model, country code, registration number, and VIN or equivalent identifier) — leaving the five other companion schedules (Forms 250.02 through 250.06) disclosed as separate, open backlog candidates, per the parent Form 250.00 document's own description. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Republic of Kazakhstan or the State Revenue Committee.

authority.name: Комитет государственных доходов Министерства финансов Республики Казахстан (State Revenue Committee of the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Kazakhstan)

source.documentRef: Приложение 1 к Декларации об активах и обязательствах физического лица (форма 250.00), Приложение 10 к приказу Министра финансов Республики Казахстан от 12 ноября 2025 года № 695 — форма 250.01

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-4050, deepening Kazakhstan's Taxes vertical by authoring the first of the six disclosed companion schedules (Form 250.01) the GOV-4043 cycle flagged as open backlog when it authored the main Form 250.00 declaration. Independently re-fetched this cycle: https://adilet.zan.kz/rus/docs/V2500037390, HTTP 200 via curl -k (the same TLS-chain-missing-intermediate quirk already documented for this domain across every prior KZ cycle — a server misconfiguration, not a real access gate), text/html, 2,660,118 bytes. Form 250.01 itself is embedded as a single scanned page image, /files/1576/49/197.jpg, fetched directly (curl -k, HTTP 200) and read visually to transcribe both of its sections in full, then cross-checked line-by-line against the order's own explanatory text (Пояснение по составлению декларации об активах и обязательствах физического лица, форма 250.00, Глава 3 "Составление формы 250.01", items 11-13), which confirms every column's own meaning and, for column B of each section, states the printed category list directly in prose rather than pointing to an external classifier (real estate: земельный участок, здание, дом, гараж, дача, коммерческое здание, часть здания, квартира, офис, парковочное место в крытом паркинге, сооружение, воздушное судно, морское судно, судно внутреннего водного плавания, судно плавания «река-море»; vehicles: легковой автомобиль, мотоцикл, грузовая машина, excluding air/sea/river vessels, which are captured in the real-estate section instead per item 13's own text). Both category lists are modelled as free strings rather than invented enums, since the printed specimen itself shows a blank text box (not a dropdown/checkbox widget) for column B in each section — the same free-string convention this registry already applies to KGD's own currency/country-code fields. The reference specimen's own worked example row (below each section's blank rows) confirms three blank entry rows per section; modelled as this registry's standard flat entryN-prefixed convention (realEstateEntry1-3, vehicleEntry1-3), consistent with the small bounded-capacity tables already established across the KZ 220.0X schedule series (e.g. `kz/kgd/individual-income-tax-declaration-schedule-220-07`). Country codes (column C/D) are modelled as the two-letter classifier already established for Form 250.00 itself (Классификатор стран мира, Decision No. 378 of the Customs Union Commission, 20 September 2010) — a distinct, two-letter convention from the three-digit country-code classifier the 220.0X schedule series cites, confirmed directly from the order's own text for both series rather than assumed identical. Boundary-checked against the next schedule: image 198.jpg was fetched and confirmed to be Form 250.02 ("Раздел В. а) Сведения о деньгах физического лица на банковских счетах..."), confirming Form 250.01 is exactly one page (197) as the GOV-4043 cycle's own VERIFICATION.md structure list stated. No submission was made and no live kgd.gov.kz/cabinet.salyk.kz account was created or required to author this schema.

fields.name: iin
fields.label: ИИН
fields.description: The declarant's 12-digit Individual Identification Number (ИИН), the same identifier used on the main Form 250.00 declaration this schedule is attached to.

fields.name: representedPersonIin
fields.label: ИИН представляемого лица
fields.description: The 12-digit IIN of the minor and/or legally incapacitated person being represented, if this schedule is filed by a legal representative. The schedule page prints only a single IIN box here, unlike the main Form 250.00 declaration's own separate boolean gate and name fields for the same case.

fields.name: currentSheetNumber
fields.label: Укажите номер текущего листа
fields.description: The sequential sheet number of this schedule page, printed in a box at the top right of every page of this schedule (relevant when more than one page is filed to list additional rows).

fields.name: realEstateEntry1Type
fields.label: Вид недвижимого имущества (строка 1)
fields.description: The type of foreign-registered real estate reported in row 1 — e.g. земельный участок (land plot), здание/дом (building/house), гараж, дача, коммерческое здание, часть здания, квартира, офис, парковочное место в крытом паркинге, сооружение, воздушное судно, морское судно, судно внутреннего водного плавания, or судно плавания «река-море», per the order's own explanatory text (Глава 3, item 12(2)). Modelled as a free string since the printed specimen shows a blank text box, not a dropdown.

fields.name: realEstateEntry1CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 1)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the foreign country where the real estate in row 1 is registered, per the Classifier of World Countries (Decision No. 378 of the Customs Union Commission, 20 September 2010) — the same external classifier and two-letter convention already established for the parent Form 250.00 schema.

fields.name: realEstateEntry1IdentificationNumber
fields.label: Идентификационный (кадастровый) номер (строка 1)
fields.description: The identification (cadastral) number of the real estate in row 1, per its title/registration documents.

fields.name: realEstateEntry1Address
fields.label: Место нахождения (адрес) (строка 1)
fields.description: The location (address) of the real estate in row 1 — country, locality, street, house/building number, and apartment/office/room number, or, for aircraft/vessels, the address of the home base or port of registration, per the order's own explanatory text (Глава 3, item 12(5)).

fields.name: realEstateEntry2Type
fields.label: Вид недвижимого имущества (строка 2)
fields.description: The type of foreign-registered real estate reported in row 2. See realEstateEntry1Type for the full category list.

fields.name: realEstateEntry2CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 2)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the foreign country where the real estate in row 2 is registered. See realEstateEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: realEstateEntry2IdentificationNumber
fields.label: Идентификационный (кадастровый) номер (строка 2)
fields.description: The identification (cadastral) number of the real estate in row 2, per its title/registration documents.

fields.name: realEstateEntry2Address
fields.label: Место нахождения (адрес) (строка 2)
fields.description: The location (address) of the real estate in row 2. See realEstateEntry1Address for the full description.

fields.name: realEstateEntry3Type
fields.label: Вид недвижимого имущества (строка 3)
fields.description: The type of foreign-registered real estate reported in row 3. See realEstateEntry1Type for the full category list.

fields.name: realEstateEntry3CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 3)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the foreign country where the real estate in row 3 is registered. See realEstateEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: realEstateEntry3IdentificationNumber
fields.label: Идентификационный (кадастровый) номер (строка 3)
fields.description: The identification (cadastral) number of the real estate in row 3, per its title/registration documents.

fields.name: realEstateEntry3Address
fields.label: Место нахождения (адрес) (строка 3)
fields.description: The location (address) of the real estate in row 3. See realEstateEntry1Address for the full description.

fields.name: vehicleEntry1Type
fields.label: Вид транспорта (строка 1)
fields.description: The type of foreign-registered vehicle reported in row 1 — e.g. легковой автомобиль (passenger car), мотоцикл (motorcycle), or грузовая машина (truck). Per the order's own explanatory text (Глава 3, item 13(2)), air, sea, and river vessels are excluded from this section (they are reported under the real-estate section instead).

fields.name: vehicleEntry1BrandModel
fields.label: Марка, модель (строка 1)
fields.description: The brand and model of the vehicle in row 1.

fields.name: vehicleEntry1CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 1)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the foreign country where the vehicle in row 1 is registered. See realEstateEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: vehicleEntry1RegistrationNumber
fields.label: Идентификационный (государственный) номер (строка 1)
fields.description: The identification (state registration/license plate) number of the vehicle in row 1, per its registration certificate or equivalent title document.

fields.name: vehicleEntry1VinCode
fields.label: VIN-код (номер кузова) (строка 1)
fields.description: The VIN (chassis number) of the vehicle in row 1, per its registration certificate; for rail rolling stock, the manufacturer's serial number; for other vehicles, the engine number, per the order's own explanatory text (Глава 3, item 13(6)).

fields.name: vehicleEntry2Type
fields.label: Вид транспорта (строка 2)
fields.description: The type of foreign-registered vehicle reported in row 2. See vehicleEntry1Type for the full description.

fields.name: vehicleEntry2BrandModel
fields.label: Марка, модель (строка 2)
fields.description: The brand and model of the vehicle in row 2.

fields.name: vehicleEntry2CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 2)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the foreign country where the vehicle in row 2 is registered. See realEstateEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: vehicleEntry2RegistrationNumber
fields.label: Идентификационный (государственный) номер (строка 2)
fields.description: The identification (state registration/license plate) number of the vehicle in row 2.

fields.name: vehicleEntry2VinCode
fields.label: VIN-код (номер кузова) (строка 2)
fields.description: The VIN (chassis number) of the vehicle in row 2. See vehicleEntry1VinCode for the full description.

fields.name: vehicleEntry3Type
fields.label: Вид транспорта (строка 3)
fields.description: The type of foreign-registered vehicle reported in row 3. See vehicleEntry1Type for the full description.

fields.name: vehicleEntry3BrandModel
fields.label: Марка, модель (строка 3)
fields.description: The brand and model of the vehicle in row 3.

fields.name: vehicleEntry3CountryCode
fields.label: Код страны (строка 3)
fields.description: The two-letter country code of the foreign country where the vehicle in row 3 is registered. See realEstateEntry1CountryCode for the classifier reference.

fields.name: vehicleEntry3RegistrationNumber
fields.label: Идентификационный (государственный) номер (строка 3)
fields.description: The identification (state registration/license plate) number of the vehicle in row 3.

fields.name: vehicleEntry3VinCode
fields.label: VIN-код (номер кузова) (строка 3)
fields.description: The VIN (chassis number) of the vehicle in row 3. See vehicleEntry1VinCode for the full description.
